$comment: Layer C for SETTLE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS affine subscripts + subscripted MOVE). Four ACCEPTs fill cells W-ITEM(1..4) by subscripted MOVE at input positions 0..3 (domain W-ITEM, PIC 9(4)V99). The loop unrolls I=1..2 and the strided subscript W-ITEM(2*I) resolves to cells 2 and 4 (input positions 1 and 3), so W-PAID is the affine sum of the two settlements and the 2% fee rounding half-boundary is an affine obligation the engine solves directly.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SETTLE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-settle)
